name: Lumpia Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crushed garlic with the red wine vinegar in a bowl.
2. Add black pepper and stir until well mixed.
3. Stir in the fish sauce until combined.
4. Finely chop the red chiles and add them to the mixture.
5. Mix everything thoroughly and allow it to sit for at least one day before serving.
